headline: Barclays Maintains Equal-Weight on JM Smucker, Raises Price Target to $125
summary: Barclays  analyst Andrew Lazar   maintains JM Smucker (NYSE:SJM) with a Equal-Weight and raises the price target from $105 to $125.
